verse.name: v1
verse.lines: On Sinai Mount with radiant face To intercede for Heaven’s grace Upon the stubborn wayward race He (Moses) fasted.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Once lifted from the miry clay When opposition came His way David the King would often pray With fasting.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Daniel possessed a visions gift He told the troubled king his dream Had light on God’s prophetic scheme Through fasting.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The prophetess in the temple court Beheld the Babe the two had brought For Him she longed and sought and prayed With fasting.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So shall they fast when I am gone Was this no word to act upon Thus you should live and watch and pray With fasting.
